botToken.title: Bot token
botToken.description: Get your bot token from @BotFather on Telegram

allowedUserIds.title: Allowed user IDs
allowedUserIds.description: Comma-separated Telegram user IDs allowed to interact with the bot. Leave empty to allow all users.

config.edited: Telegram bot settings have been updated
config.notEdited: Failed to update Telegram bot settings

texts.aboutTelegramSettings: Configure your Telegram bot integration. Create a bot via @BotFather on Telegram to get a bot token, then optionally restrict access to specific user IDs.
